title: ADDICTION SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: SMART RECOVERY USA ADDICTION SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups and peer counseling to help individuals gain independence from addiction and addictive behaviors, including substance use disorder, gambling addiction, and sexual addiction. Offers a "no higher power" approach. The program has four aspects: building motivation, coping with urges, problem-solving, and developing a balanced lifestyle. 7304 Mentor Avenue Suite F Mentor, OH 44060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by meeting Email (440) 951-5357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (440) 951-5357 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information about in-person and online support groups FEES: None, donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Oregon Services: Gambling Addiction Support Groups General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Sexual/Love Addiction Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SMART RECOVERY USA
